VJGA
PROJECTS
EVENTS
BECOME A
VJGA MEMBER
At the VJGA, we invite passionate individuals to join our community of skilled gardeners dedicated to preserving and promoting the art of Japanese gardening.
VANCOUVER
JAPANESE
GARDENERS
ASSOCIATION
By becoming a member, you'll have the opportunity to collaborate on meaningful projects, share your expertise, and grow professionally within a supportive network.


For more information or to apply, please contact our office.


CONTACT
Members have the opportunity to enrich their knowledge within the gardening community, accessing exclusive subscriptions to magazines and books focused on gardening and landscaping.


They can also participate in planning and attending gardening workshops, as well as tours related to the prestigious Sumi Award.


Topics covered within these activities include landscape planning, management of gardens, instructional gardening skills and field trip to nurseries.


CONTACT
